title: Rash Driving
description: Driving any vehicle in a manner that is dangerous or negligent, endangering human life.

title: Causing Death by Negligence
description: Causing death of a person through a negligent or rash act without intention to kill.

title: Causing Hurt by Act Endangering Life
description: Causing injury to another person due to a reckless or negligent act.

title: Causing Grievous Hurt by Endangering Life
description: Causing serious injury through a dangerous or negligent act.

title: Cheating and Dishonestly Inducing Delivery
description: Deceiving someone to gain property, money, or advantage fraudulently.

title: Criminal Breach of Trust
description: Misusing or dishonestly using property entrusted to someone.

title: Criminal Breach of Trust by Public Servant
description: Public servant misusing entrusted property or funds.

title: Punishment for Cheating
description: Punishment for deceiving a person and causing harm or loss.

title: Cheating with Knowledge of Loss
description: Cheating someone knowing it will cause wrongful loss.

title: Outraging Modesty of Woman
description: Assaulting or using criminal force against a woman with intent to outrage her modesty.

title: Insulting Modesty of Woman
description: Using words, gestures, or acts intended to insult a woman's modesty.

title: Cruelty by Husband or Relatives
description: Harassment or cruelty by husband or his relatives towards a married woman.

title: Rape
description: Sexual intercourse without consent under defined circumstances.

title: Sexual Harassment
description: Unwelcome physical contact, sexual advances, or inappropriate remarks.

title: Assault to Disrobe Woman
description: Use of force to disrobe or compel a woman to be naked.

title: Theft
description: Dishonestly taking movable property without consent.

title: Punishment for Theft
description: Punishment for committing theft.

title: Theft in Dwelling House
description: Theft committed inside a house or building.

title: Theft by Clerk or Servant
description: Theft committed by an employee or servant.

title: Dishonest Misappropriation
description: Using someone else's property dishonestly for personal gain.

title: Criminal Trespass
description: Entering property unlawfully with intent to commit an offense.

title: Punishment for Trespass
description: Penalty for unlawful entry into property.

title: House Trespass
description: Entering someone’s house unlawfully.

title: Assault
description: Threatening or attempting to use force against another person.

title: Punishment for Assault
description: Penalty for assault or use of criminal force.

title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt
description: Intentionally causing bodily pain or injury.

title: Grievous Hurt
description: Causing serious bodily injury intentionally.

title: Grievous Hurt with Dangerous Weapons
description: Causing severe injury using weapons or dangerous means.

title: Criminal Intimidation
description: Threatening someone with harm to cause fear.

title: Criminal Intimidation Definition
description: Threatening injury to person, reputation, or property.

title: Public Nuisance
description: Acts that cause harm or inconvenience to the public.

title: Punishment for Public Nuisance
description: Penalty for committing public nuisance.

title: Obscene Acts
description: Performing obscene acts in public places.

title: Disobedience to Public Order
description: Disobeying orders issued by public authorities.

title: Public Servant Disobeying Law
description: Public servant disobeying legal directions knowingly.

title: Public Servant Framing Incorrect Document
description: Public servant creating false documents.

title: Corrupt Judicial Decision
description: Judge making a decision knowing it is unjust.

title: Defamation
description: Making or publishing false statements that harm a person's reputation.

title: Punishment for Defamation
description: Penalty for harming someone's reputation through false statements.

title: Printing Defamatory Content
description: Printing or engraving defamatory material knowingly.

title: Selling Defamatory Content
description: Selling printed defamatory material knowingly.

title: Forgery
description: Making false documents with intent to cause damage or fraud.

title: Punishment for Forgery
description: Penalty for creating fake documents or records.

title: Forgery for Cheating
description: Forgery committed specifically for cheating purposes.

title: Using Forged Document
description: Using a fake document as if it were genuine.

title: Making Counterfeit Seal
description: Creating fake seals or stamps for forgery.

title: Possession of Forged Document
description: Having forged documents with intent to use them fraudulently.

title: Criminal Conspiracy
description: Agreement between two or more persons to commit an illegal act.

title: Punishment for Conspiracy
description: Penalty for involvement in criminal conspiracy.

title: Acts Done by Several Persons
description: When a criminal act is done by several people with common intention.

title: Unlawful Assembly
description: Every member of unlawful assembly is responsible for offense committed.

title: Unlawful Assembly Definition
description: Assembly of five or more persons with unlawful purpose.

title: Rioting
description: Use of force or violence by unlawful assembly.

title: Punishment for Rioting
description: Penalty for engaging in violent group activity.

title: Rioting with Deadly Weapon
description: Rioting while armed with dangerous weapons.

title: Promoting Enmity
description: Promoting hatred between different groups on grounds of religion, race, etc.

title: Outraging Religious Feelings
description: Deliberate acts intended to insult religious beliefs.

title: Obscene Material
description: Sale or distribution of obscene books or content.

title: Obscene Material to Minors
description: Providing obscene material to young persons.

title: Illegal Lottery
description: Running or participating in unauthorized lotteries.

title: Causing Disappearance of Evidence
description: Destroying evidence to hide a crime.

title: Intentional Omission to Inform
description: Failing to report a crime knowingly.

title: Giving False Information
description: Providing false information regarding an offense.

title: False Charge of Offense
description: Falsely accusing someone of a crime.

title: False Information to Public Servant
description: Providing false information to a government official.

title: False Evidence
description: Giving false evidence in court.

title: Threatening Witness
description: Threatening or influencing witnesses.

title: Destruction of Document
description: Destroying documents required as evidence.

title: Assault on Public Servant
description: Using force against a public servant during duty.

title: Obstructing Public Servant
description: Obstructing a public servant from doing duty.

title: Threatening Public Servant
description: Threatening a public servant to influence their actions.

title: Act of Person Incapable of Judgment
description: Acts committed under intoxication without knowledge.

title: Right of Private Defense
description: Right to defend oneself against unlawful harm.

title: Right of Private Defense of Body and Property
description: Right to protect oneself and property from harm.

title: Right of Private Defense Causing Death
description: Right to cause death in self-defense under extreme threat.

title: Extortion
description: Intentionally putting a person in fear to dishonestly obtain property or money.

title: Punishment for Extortion
description: Penalty for committing extortion.

title: Putting Person in Fear of Injury
description: Threatening a person to commit extortion.

title: Extortion by Threat of Death
description: Extortion involving threat of death or serious injury.

title: Criminal Intimidation
description: Threatening someone to cause fear of injury or harm.

title: Anonymous Threat
description: Criminal intimidation through anonymous communication.

title: Electronic Obscene Content
description: Publishing or transmitting obscene material electronically.

title: Stalking
description: Repeatedly following or contacting a person against their will.

title: Criminal Intimidation by Anonymous Communication
description: Threatening someone while hiding identity.

title: Online Defamation
description: Defamation committed through online or digital platforms.

title: Digital Forgery
description: Creating fake digital documents or records.

title: Using Fake Digital Documents
description: Using forged digital records as genuine.

title: Identity Theft
description: Using someone else's identity or credentials fraudulently.

title: Cheating by Personation Online
description: Online fraud through impersonation.

title: Violation of Privacy
description: Capturing or sharing private images without consent.

title: Publishing Obscene Content Online
description: Publishing or transmitting obscene content in electronic form.

title: Sexually Explicit Content
description: Publishing sexually explicit content online.

title: Child Sexual Content
description: Publishing or browsing child sexual content online.

title: Breach of Confidentiality
description: Unauthorized disclosure of information.

title: Disclosure of Personal Information
description: Misusing personal data without consent.

title: Kidnapping
description: Taking a person away unlawfully.

title: Kidnapping from Guardianship
description: Taking a minor away from lawful guardian.

title: Abduction
description: Forcibly taking someone away using deceit or force.

title: Kidnapping for Murder
description: Kidnapping with intent to kill.

title: Kidnapping with Wrongful Confinement
description: Kidnapping with intent to secretly confine a person.

title: Wrongful Confinement
description: Restricting a person unlawfully in a space.

title: Wrongful Restraint
description: Preventing a person from moving freely.

title: Wrongful Restraint Definition
description: Obstructing a person from proceeding in a direction.

title: Abetment
description: Encouraging or aiding someone to commit a crime.

title: Punishment for Abetment
description: Penalty for helping or encouraging a crime.

title: Abetment of Suicide
description: Encouraging or assisting someone to commit suicide.

title: Non-attendance in Obedience
description: Failure to attend when required by law.

title: Omission to Produce Document
description: Failing to produce documents required by law.

title: Failure to Inform Public Authority
description: Failing to inform authorities when legally required.

title: Furnishing False Information
description: Providing false information to authorities.

title: Refusing to Answer Public Servant
description: Refusing to answer questions from authorized officials.

title: Refusing to Sign Statement
description: Refusing to sign statements when required.
